description_long: This is a robust urban bench featuring a seat and backrest made from dark, weathered wooden planks, supported by a sturdy metallic frame. The seat consists of three wide wooden slats, while the backrest is constructed from four matching horizontal planks, all securely fastened to the metal supports. The base is composed of two thick, rectangular metal legs with a broad connecting plate, providing stability and resistance to tipping. The metal components have a slightly matte, industrial finish, suggesting durability against outdoor elements. The bench lacks armrests, giving it a minimalist and functional appearance suitable for public spaces. Its design is optimized for comfort, resilience, and ease of maintenance in high-traffic urban environments.
description: A sturdy urban bench with dark wooden planks and a solid metal frame, featuring a backrest and no armrests. Its industrial design is ideal for outdoor public spaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden planks and the depth of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, four-plank backrest, and the broad metal base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the seat and backrest thickness, with clear visibility of the metal support structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the metal supports attached to the backrest and the solid metal base plate.
attribute_leg_design: two wide rectangular metal supports with a connecting base plate
